title: Data Breach / Cyber Intrusion
mitigation: Implemented AES-256 encryption and RSA key exchange protocols in software projects to ensure data confidentiality and integrity.

title: Operational Equipment Failure
mitigation: Strict adherence to Dynamic Risk Assessment (DRA) and rigorous pre-incident equipment checks.

title: Information Asymmetry
mitigation: Advanced intelligence analysis and cross-functional reporting to ensure accurate 'Common Relevant Operational Picture'.

title: Software Regression
mitigation: Automated CI/CD pipelines and comprehensive unit testing to catch breaking changes before deployment.

title: Resource Scarcity (On-Call)
mitigation: Strategic staffing models and mutual aid agreements between neighboring stations.
